## Editing.IEditorContext interface

Generic editor context for entity collections. Provides CRUD operations and validation for pre-validated entities in a collection. For raw input handling, use [Editing.IValidatingEditorContext](./ts-chocolate.editing.ivalidatingeditorcontext.md)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IEditorContext<T, TBaseId extends string = string, TId extends string = string> 
```
